description: Cancer diagnosis information for thoracic malignancies. One entry per cancer diagnosis; recurrences or metastases do not count as a new diagnosis. Be very careful not to include non-cancer diagnoses.

items.name: Primary Site
items.description: Primary anatomical site of the cancer

items.name: Overall Stage at Diagnosis
items.description: Overall cancer stage at time of diagnosis (e.g., I, IIA, IIIB, IV)

items.name: T Stage at Diagnosis
items.description: Tumor stage component at diagnosis (e.g., T2a, T3b)

items.name: N Stage at Diagnosis
items.description: Nodal stage component at diagnosis (e.g., N0, N1, N2, N3)

items.name: M Stage at Diagnosis
items.description: Metastasis stage component at diagnosis (e.g., M0, M1a, M1b)

items.name: Histology
items.valid_codes: non_small_cell_NOS, small_cell, adenocarcinoma, squamous, adenosquamous, large_cell, large_cell_neuroendocrine, typical_carcinoid, atypical_carcinoid, carcinoid_nos, nut_carcinoma, epithelioid, sarcomatoid, thymoma, thymic_carcinoma

items.name: Diagnosis Date
items.description: Date of cancer diagnosis. As specific as is known; if only year is indicated, list year; if month is indicated also, list month and year. Format YYYY-MM-DD when possible.
